name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Ophidia series GG mini tote bag. The Ophidia series reinterprets new sizes and styles, integrating the handle and shoulder strap for versatile carrying experiences. This tote bag is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, featuring iconic double G accessories that add charm to the overall look. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen blend lining with double G, handle (12cm high), shoulder strap (28.5cm high).

Color: Brown/PVC.
Made in Italy
